title: phylogyne × infundibulum
intro: Phylogyne × infundibulum, also known as the Golden Trumpet, is a flowering plant species in the family Clusiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phylogyne × infundibulum include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Phylogyne × infundibulum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
